nodes.label: Motor_Init.vi
nodes.rationale: No global objects; init in startup state only to fix Python's module-level side effects.

nodes.label: Motor_CheckLimits.vi
nodes.rationale: Reject user inputs moving motor more than 50,000 steps and implement serial port reset to prevent controller unresponsiveness on limit switches.

nodes.label: SMU_Close.vi
nodes.rationale: Always include 100ms delay between serial close/open to prevent port lockups.

nodes.label: ManualMove.vi
nodes.rationale: Always read back actual steps after move to prevent missing position updates in contact_point_move.
